  • About

    Michael Rose is just another boring, tattooed, time traveling designer from Buffalo.

Mastering Paper by 53

Tutorials and techniques to help learn Paper.

In the spirit of openness I’ve decided to compile everything I’ve learned using Paper by FiftyThree, into a multi-part series I’m dubbing Mastering Paper.

  • Getting Started with Paper for iPad
  • Introduction and Tool Guide
  • Moving the Zoom Loupe
  • Drawing and Painting Basics
  • Erasing and Correcting Mistakes
  • Printing a Moleskine Book
  • Step by Step Paper Tutorials
  • How to Draw Trees and Grass
  • How to Draw Skies and Clouds
  • How to Draw Water and Waves
  • How to Draw Textures
  • How to Draw Skin and Faces
  • How to Draw Hair
  • Advanced Paper Techniques
  • The Grid Method
  • Contour Line Drawing

Erasing and Correcting

October 25, 2014

Learn how to use Paper by 53's eraser tool to correct and cover-up mistakes.

Paper 2.0.0 Bugs and Other Strange Behaviors

September 28, 2014

Documented bugs and other strange behaviors found in Paper by 53 version 2.0.0 when using Pencil.

Paper Quick Tip: Watercolor Brush Improvements

September 16, 2014

Not only did FiftyThree release Mix today, but they also snuck in a few improvements to the watercolor brush tool…

Paper Creators, Join Me in FiftyThree’s Mix

September 16, 2014

FiftyThree’s Mix makes finding, sharing, and learning from inspiring Paper creators easy and fun.

The Grid Method

July 06, 2014

Learn how to use the Grid Method with Paper by 53 to create accurate line drawings and elevate your work to the next level.

Paper Quick Tip: Moving the Loupe

July 03, 2014

Learn how to reposition Paper by 53's Zoom loupe mid-stroke to aid in painting large detailed shapes.

Drawing Skin and Faces

April 21, 2014

Learn more techniques for drawing and painting faces using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Back to Basics

February 09, 2014

A refresher on drawing, painting, and the basics of color theory using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Quick Tip: Contour Line Drawing

January 13, 2014

A drawing exercise to improve hand eye coordination and the power of observation with the iPad app Paper by 53.

Pencil by 53 Review. The Best Stylus for Paper?

December 11, 2013

Impressions of FiftyThree's new Pencil stylus from the perspective of an avid Paper creator.

Drawing Textures

November 25, 2013

Learn techniques for drawing bricks, wood, and rock textures using the iPad app Paper by 53.

First Look at Blend and Pencil by 53

November 20, 2013

53’s Pencil and new Blend feature is full of promise. Here’s a taste of what is possible with both.

Printing a Moleskine Book

November 08, 2013

Impressions of a handmade Moleskine book printed with the iPad app Paper by 53.

Drawing Water and Waves

September 29, 2013

Learn techniques for drawing water and waves using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Drawing Skies and Clouds

September 05, 2013

Learn techniques to draw blue skies, clouds, and pretty sunsets using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Drawing Trees and Grass

August 31, 2013

Learn techniques to draw trees, green grass, bushes, and other foliage using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Introduction and Tool Guide

July 31, 2013

An introduction to Paper's tools and how to exploit them for drawing realistically.

Drawing Faces without Faces

May 16, 2013

Short on time? Here's the quick and fun way I draw portraits using Paper by 53.

How to Draw Realistic Hair

May 10, 2013

I'm often asked what my technique for drawing hair is. What follows is my answer to that question.

A Short Guide to Drawing

February 13, 2013

Learn how I use Paper by 53 to draw faceless portraits and landscapes on an iPad.
